name: Spiced Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and shortening.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in molasses; blend in cream.
4. Sift flour, cinnamon, ginger, and cloves; stir into the creamed mixture.
5. Store in a covered bowl in the refrigerator overnight.
6. Roll dough thin using a floured pastry cloth on the board and rolling pin.
7. Cut into animal shapes.
8. Place cookies 1 to 1 1/2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
10. Remove from baking sheets and cool on racks.
